name: intent-review
description: Independent plan and implementation review against the user's original intent.

interface.shortDescription: Keep agent plans and code aligned with your intent.
interface.longDescription: Intent Review records the original task contract, independently reviews planning documents, and verifies the finished implementation against the approved plan and repository boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Record this task's intent before planning.
Review the current plan against my original request.
Verify the implementation against the approved plan.
